action_contract: Factorized binary recorded diuretic exposure and renal-replacement support; action families are fixed before data and support is gated on validation only.
anchor_contract: Earliest time-bounded creatinine change meeting the frozen KDIGO-compatible criteria or first renal-replacement start; no ICD, BUN-only, future-baseline, or urine-output identity fallback.
claim_boundary: Recorded-trajectory forecasting and benchmark-validity auditing only. Treatment, causal, counterfactual, policy-selection, clinical-utility, deployment, and autonomous-decision claims are blocked.
state_interval: Fully contained pre-action four-hour history bins ending before t, including only earlier creatinine history.
target_interval: Observed physiology values, masks, and recencies in [t+4h,t+8h).
